item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-031","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Negative control stayed routed to release review rather than triggering a TVG/product-strengthening loop from the word audit.
